title: Audit Manager
description:
DESCRIPTION

  • Provide guidance and expertise to professional staff and participate in the conduct of a wide range of assurance services, with a particular focus on complex audits.
  • Develop and train team members by encouraging individuals to think for themselves and take responsibility for their contributions to the team.
  • Understand the clients’ industry, key performance drivers, business trends, and emerging technical and industry developments.
  • Plan engagement objectives to ensure compliance with professional standards and appropriately address risk. Prepare and review management communications, proposals budgets, and negotiate fees and overruns.
  • Review and approve for signing all financial statements, opinions and reports and other deliverable documents for clients.
  • Monitor team progress against plan and drive performance as required.

ESSENTIAL ATTRIBUTES

  • Have a proven track record.
  • Have sound knowledge of Singapore Financial Reporting Standards and Singapore Standards on Auditing.
  • demonstrate an ability to lead and motivate others.
  • Have strong initiative and self-motivation.
  • Be able to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
  • Display a high level of people and business skills. Managers will be expected to have shown an on-going commitment to their personal and professional development through continuing education and development.

QUALIFICATION & EXPERIENCE

  • Be a qualified accountant (CA Singapore or other relevant professional accounting qualifications) or en route to attaining such qualifications
  • Have at least 5 years of relevant audit experience in a professional accounting firm in Singapore
  • Knowledge of Caseware audit software would be an added advantage

postedCompany.description:
Nexia Singapore PAC. Our directors and managers have extensive experience and are supported by a large group of dedicated and skilled professional staff. Our expertise covers audit and assurance, tax, business advisory, outsourcing, risk and governance, corporate recovery, company incorporation, corporate secretarial services, and IT infrastructure and solutions. Combined with our global network, our capabilities and resources allow us to provide you the support that your business needs, no matter where you are on your growth journey.


At Nexia Singapore PAC, we constantly strive to deliver service excellence. Regardless of the nature or size of the engagement, we insist on uncompromising quality, working in our clients’ best interests while upholding our values of integrity and professionalism. We aspire to be a practice that clients and employees are proud to be associated with.
postedCompany.name: NEXIA SINGAPORE PAC

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
